title: Hotel Check-in
intro:
Go to the self check-in machine or walk to reception.

Present your passport and collect your room key.

All bookings are under Diplomark LTD.

steps.title: Go to the check-in machine or reception desk
steps.detail: Use the self check-in kiosk in the lobby, or walk directly to the reception desk.

steps.title: Present your passport
steps.detail: Hand over your passport to complete the check-in.

steps.title: Collect your room key
steps.detail: All bookings are under Diplomark LTD. Staff will locate your reservation and hand you your room key.

bring: This app for your booking reference
check_in_note: You may arrive earlier and check availability. Rooms are often ready before 3 PM.
